allow: PowerShell(node -e "const r=require\('./report_extract/report.json'\);const out=[];for\(const f of r.files\){for\(const t of f.tests\){const s=t.results&&t.results.length?t.results.map\(x=>x.status\).join\(','\):t.outcome;if\(t.outcome==='skipped'||\(t.results||[]\).some\(x=>x.status==='skipped'\)\){out.push\(f.fileName+' :: '+t.title\)}}}console.log\(out.join\('\\n'\)\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const r=require\('./report_extract/report.json'\);for\(const f of r.files\){for\(const t of f.tests\){if\(t.outcome==='skipped'||\(t.results||[]\).some\(x=>x.status==='skipped'\)\){const ann=\(t.annotations||[]\).map\(a=>a.type+': '+\(a.description||''\)\).join\(' | '\);console.log\(t.title+'\\n   '+ann+'\\n'\)}}}")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);let s=fs.readFileSync\('investigate11.js','utf8'\);s=s.split\(`page.locator\('a:visible'\).filter\({ hasText: /^accept$/i }\).first\(\)`\).join\(`page.locator\('a:visible', { hasText: 'Accept' }\).first\(\)`\);s=s.split\(`page.locator\('a:visible'\).filter\({ hasText: /^decline$/i }\).first\(\)`\).join\(`page.locator\('a:visible', { hasText: 'Decline' }\).first\(\)`\);fs.writeFileSync\('investigate11.js',s\);console.log\('ok'\)")

PowerShell($sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://staging-global.mentorcloud.com/accounts/login/" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "$\($r.StatusCode\) in $\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds.ToString\('0.0'\)\)s" } catch { "FAILED after $\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds.ToString\('0.0'\)\)s :: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const{chromium}=require\('@playwright/test'\);\(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\(\);const c=await b.newContext\({storageState:'playwright/.auth/mentor.json'}\);const p=await c.newPage\(\);await p.goto\('https://staging-global.mentorcloud.com/community/',{waitUntil:'domcontentloaded',timeout:120000}\);await p.waitForTimeout\(8000\);console.log\('probe post remnants:',await p.locator\('.mc-card--post',{hasText:'QA probe post'}\).count\(\)\);await b.close\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const{chromium}=require\('@playwright/test'\);\(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\(\);const c=await b.newContext\({storageState:'playwright/.auth/mentor.json'}\);const p=await c.newPage\(\);await p.goto\('https://staging-global.mentorcloud.com/profile/update',{waitUntil:'domcontentloaded',timeout:120000}\);await p.waitForTimeout\(8000\);const inp=p.locator\('input.js_dropdown_val'\).first\(\);console.log\('before:',await inp.inputValue\(\)\);await inp.click\(\);await inp.fill\('9:00 AM'\);await inp.press\('Tab'\);await p.waitForTimeout\(1500\);console.log\('after fill+tab:',await inp.inputValue\(\)\);await inp.click\(\);await inp.fill\('12:00 AM'\);await inp.press\('Tab'\);await p.waitForTimeout\(1500\);console.log\('restored:',await inp.inputValue\(\)\);await b.close\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);let s=fs.readFileSync\('tests/profile/profile.spec.ts','utf8'\);s=s.split\('await pickTime\(target\);'\).join\('await setTime\(target\);'\);s=s.split\('await pickTime\(original\).catch\(\(\) => {}\);'\).join\('await setTime\(original\).catch\(\(\) => {}\);'\);fs.writeFileSync\('tests/profile/profile.spec.ts',s\);console.log\('pickTime refs remaining:',\(s.match\(/pickTime/g\)||[]\).length\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);let s=fs.readFileSync\('tests/sessions/sessions.spec.ts','utf8'\);const tests=['TC-SESS-020 fireside chat detail exposes Join','TC-SESS-025 host Update opens','TC-SESS-026 Take Session Notes'];let count=0;for\(const t of tests\){const idx=s.indexOf\(t\);if\(idx<0\){console.log\('NOT FOUND:',t\);continue}const seg=s.slice\(idx,idx+700\);const replaced=seg.replace\('const fscLink = await ensureFiresideChat\(page\);','const fscLink = await ensureHostFiresideChat\(page\);'\);if\(seg!==replaced\){s=s.slice\(0,idx\)+replaced+s.slice\(idx+700\);count++}}fs.writeFileSync\('tests/sessions/sessions.spec.ts',s\);console.log\('switched to host helper:',count\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const{chromium}=require\('@playwright/test'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);\(async\(\)=>{const html=fs.readFileSync\('qa-testcases.html','utf8'\);const b=await chromium.launch\(\);const p=await b.newPage\(\);await p.setViewportSize\({width:794,height:600}\);await p.setContent\(html,{waitUntil:'networkidle'}\);const el=await p.locator\('.card'\).first\(\);await el.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded\(\);await p.screenshot\({path:'qa-card.png'}\);await b.close\(\);console.log\('ok'\)}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
